  for st in sub_triples:
                      sub_processed = (st.subject, st.predicate, st.object)
                      if sub_processed not in processed:
                          processed.add(sub_processed)
                          # Avoid redundant country mentions
                          if st.predicate in ["country", "city", "state", "location"]:
